executives.name: Kimberly Ann
executives.background: Ms. Ann has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in corporate finance, project development, and management. She was previously the CEO of Carube Copper Corp. and has held various executive roles in junior mining companies.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: Brian Maher
executives.background: Mr. Maher is an economic geologist with over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry. He has held senior positions with ASARCO and Hochschild Mining and was the President and CEO of Prodigy Gold Inc.

executives.name: John McNeice
executives.background: Mr. McNeice is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate governance for public companies in the resource sector.

board_of_directors.name: Kimberly Ann
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Ann has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in corporate finance, project development, and management.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher Reynolds
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Reynolds has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specifically in the areas of corporate finance and administration. He is currently the CFO of Seabridge Gold Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Josh Serfass
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Serfass is the Executive Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations at Integra Resources Corp. He has extensive experience in capital markets and corporate strategy.

board_of_directors.name: Victoria McMillan
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McMillan is a finance professional with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the CFO of several junior exploration companies.

sources.source_description: Lahontan Gold Corp. Official Website - Management and Directors Page
